creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
Hi,

guessing from rushed 18.0.3 update (not even in github repo yet, no changelog) it appears that Nextcloud 18.0.2 has some nasty bug.

Quote from a contributor: "Please make sure to update your instance soon It's better to have that fix"

https://github.com/nextcloud/server/issues/20119#issuecomment-602838544

Any chance to have get new version in ports?

Thank you in advance,
